narrative:
Precinct Plymouth Village (precinct in Huron County) has 443 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.4%, a clear Republican lean of 8.1 percentage points.
